hooks.command: file_path=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null | tr '\\' '/'); project_dir=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$project_dir" ] && [ -n "$file_path" ] && [[ "$file_path" == "$project_dir"* ]]; then branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Você está na branch main. Crie uma feature branch (git checkout -b <tipo>/<nome>) e refaça a alteração — nunca comite na main."}}'; exit 0; fi; fi
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && npx prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f" 2>/dev/null; } || true
